arts.ttl: Video: PSG Gets Lucky Break as Fabian Ruiz Opens Scoring Against Toulouse
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain and Toulouse played to a scoreless first half, but minutes into the second half, the Ligue 1 leaders broke the deadlock thanks to one player being at the right place at the right time. arts.ttl: Tottenham, Roma €50M-Rated January Target Gives Three-Word Response on Juve Future as PSG Return Unlikely
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani has made an impressive start to his Serie A career, scoring five goals in his first three matches. Paris Saint-Germain is hopeful that his successful loan at Juventus will attract suitors ahead of the summer transfer window. arts.ttl: Barcelona Gets Positive Injury Update for Key Player Ahead of Potential PSG Clash
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain cruised to a 3-0 win over Stade Brestois in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League knockout play-off on Tuesday night at Stade de Roudourou, with Ousmane Dembélé scoring twice. Unless Brest pulls off a major comeback, PSG will face either Barcelona or Liverpool in the Round of 16. arts.ttl: Aston Villa, PSG Poised to Rival Arsenal, Man Utd for €60M-Rated Serie A Star
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain could be in the market for a No. 9 this summer after loaning out Randal Kolo Muani to Juventus in January. With his departure, Gonçalo Ramos and Ousmane Dembélé have taken on the role up front. arts.ttl: Liverpool Ready to Make Bold Move for €60M-Rated PSG Midfielder This Summer
arts.sum: Under Luis Enrique, Paris Saint-Germain are bringing players ready to compete for minutes. No one is guaranteed minutes as a starter, which is what led to the permanent departure of Xavi Simons. Despite this philosophy, eventually, there will be players like Simons who feel that they want to be regular starters. arts.ttl: PSG Won’t Complete Move for £36M-Rated Liverpool Ace, Latest Report Says
arts.sum: With Milan Skriniar now at Fenerbahçe SK, Paris Saint-Germain could be on the lookout for a new center-back when the summer transfer window opens. Skriniar’s departure is permanent, so PSG will need to find a replacement. Last month, Anfield Watch reported that PSG are fully committed to signing Ibrahima Konaté.
